refnamediv.refpurpose: Return a metadata record for the requested authority and srid.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a metadata record for the requested auth_srid for the given auth_name. The record will have the auth_name, auth_srid, srname, srtext, proj4text, and the corners of the area of usage, point_sw and point_ne.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT * FROM postgis_srs('EPSG', '3005');
auth_name | EPSG auth_srid | 3005 srname | NAD83 / BC Albers srtext | PROJCS["NAD83 / BC Albers", ... ]] proj4text | +proj=aea +lat_0=45 +lon_0=-126 +lat_1=50 +lat_2=58.5 +x_0=1000000 +y_0=0 +datum=NAD83 +units=m +no_defs +type=crs point_sw | 0101000020E6100000E17A14AE476161C00000000000204840 point_ne | 0101000020E610000085EB51B81E855CC0E17A14AE47014E40
